summary: Testing completed for CRM Alpha Agency invoice/devis features. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified: PDF download works (HTTP 200, valid PDF file), bulk delete functionality works with selection toolbar, settings button visible in creation form, settings (conditions, IBAN) loaded from /api/settings/invoice.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation includes professional footer with company info, SIRET, TVA, RCS, and legal mentions
Discount format correctly shows '€' for fixed amounts (e.g., -200.00 €) and '%' for percentage
Settings (conditions, bank_details) are loaded from MongoDB 'settings' collection with type='invoice_settings'
Bulk delete uses confirmation dialog and handles errors gracefully
Settings button (gear icon) is visible in the Sheet header of creation form

success_rate.frontend: 100% (PDF download, bulk delete, settings button all working)

seed_data_creation: Created test invoices/devis during testing for PDF and bulk delete verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) PDF download returns HTTP 200 with valid PDF file (verified %PDF-1.4 header), 2) Bulk delete works with selection checkboxes and 'Supprimer' button in toolbar, 3) Settings button (gear icon) visible in creation form Sheet header, 4) Invoice settings API (/api/settings/invoice) returns conditions and bank_details (IBAN) correctly.

pdf_download_http_200.details: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type: application/pdf

pdf_valid_file.details: Downloaded PDF has valid %PDF-1.4 header, size 18232 bytes

bulk_delete_selection.details: Clicking checkboxes shows '2 sélectionné(s)' toolbar with Télécharger and Supprimer buttons

bulk_delete_api.details: DELETE /api/invoices/{id} returns 200 and removes document from database

settings_button_visible.details: Settings button (gear icon) visible in Sheet header when creating new facture/devis

settings_api_conditions.details: GET /api/settings/invoice returns default_conditions with payment terms

settings_api_bank_details.details: GET /api/settings/invoice returns bank_details with IBAN: FR76 1695 8000 0182 8600 2937 167

devis_dev_prefix.details: Creating devis returns DEV- prefix (e.g., DEV-2026-0017)

facture_fac_prefix.details: Creating facture returns FAC- prefix (e.g., FAC-2026-0008)

discount_format_fixed.details: Fixed discount stored with discountType='fixed' and displayed as '-200.00 €'

discount_format_percent.details: Percent discount stored with discountType='percent' and displayed as '-10%'

mocked_features.note: All APIs are real implementations. PDF generation uses ReportLab, settings stored in MongoDB.
